document.title: Basic Safety, Essential Performance Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

sourceSummary.oneLine: Basic safety and essential performance report for the ADD Abyz Digital Detector, file/report A-TCF-5-048 Rev.0 dated MAY/10/2020.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents manufacturer-defined basic safety, essential performance, monitoring method, EMC-related test standards/results, and immunity pass/fail criteria for the ADD.
keyPoints: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.
Acquisition image is obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
Listed EMC emission and immunity standards show PASS results.
Specific detailed immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.

concepts.name: Acquisition Software monitoring

concepts.name: Dark image evaluation
concepts.evidence: When acquiring a Dark image using Acquisition Software in the evaluation of the following criteria, there should be no problem with the image.

evidence.claim: The document file/report number is A-TCF-5-048.
evidence.evidenceText: File No A-TCF-5-048; Report No.: A-TCF-5-048 (Rev.0)

evidence.claim: The document revision is Rev.0 and the revision date is MAY/10/2020.
evidence.evidenceText: Rev. No 0; Rev. Date MAY/10/2020

evidence.claim: The report is for ADD Abyz Digital Detector.
evidence.evidenceText: Report for ADD Abyz Digital Detector

evidence.claim: The document overview states that it covers basic safety and essential performance of the ADD.
evidence.evidenceText: This document is basic safety, essential performance of the ADD.

evidence.claim: Operation checks can be monitored using acquisition software.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation check of the product can be monitored by using the acquisition software.

evidence.claim: The acquired image should be obtained as intended and should not have two adjacent lines or be blank.
evidence.evidenceText: Acquisition image is obtained as intended. The acquired image should not have two lines adjacent or be blank.

evidence.claim: Normal operation is required when operation is required.
evidence.evidenceText: Operation normally when operation is required.

evidence.claim: DC power must be consistently supplied from the power supply during EMC testing.
evidence.evidenceText: DC power is consistently supplied from POWER SUPPLY when EMC test is performed.

evidence.claim: The manufacturer-provided program must operate normally when connected to the power supply.
evidence.evidenceText: When connected to POWER SUPPLY, program provided by manufacturer is operated normally.

evidence.claim: CISPR 11 conducted emission on AC mains port and radiated emission results are PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: CISPR 11 Conducted Emission on AC mains Port PASS Radiated Emission PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-2 harmonic current emission on AC mains input port result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-2 Harmonic Current Emission on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-3-3 voltage fluctuations and flicker on AC mains input port result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-3-3 Voltage Fluctuations and Flicker on AC Mains Input Port PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-2 electrostatic discharge immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-2 Electrostatic Discharge Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-3 radio-frequency electromagnetic field amplitude modulated immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-3 Radio-frequency electromagnetic field Amplitude modulated Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-4 fast transients immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-4 Fast Transients Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-5 surges immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-5 Surges Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-6 radio-frequency common mode immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-6 Radio-frequency common mode Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-8 power frequency magnetic fields result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-8 Power frequency magnetic fields PASS

evidence.claim: IEC 61000-4-11 voltage dips and voltage interruptions immunity result is PASS.
evidence.evidenceText: IEC 61000-4-11 Voltage Dips, Voltage Interruptions Immunity PASS

evidence.claim: For immunity tests, essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected before, during, and after the test.
evidence.evidenceText: Before, during, and after the test, the essential performance and basic safety shall not be affected, and the performance degradation which does not affect essential performance and basic safety is PASS.

evidence.claim: Detailed immunity pass/fail criteria shall be based on applicable part two standards or risk management and included in the risk management file.
evidence.evidenceText: Specific, detailed IMMUNITY pass/fail criteria, shall be based on applicable part two standards or RISK MANAGEMENT, for IMMUNITY with regard to EM DISTURBANCES. These pass/fail criteria shall be included in the RISK MANAGEMENT FILE

reviewFlags.reason: No authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
The source text provides product wording as ADD Abyz Digital Detector but does not list a separate formal model number in the document body.
Minor OCR/text quality issue appears in the immunity test list: 'ltage Dips and Interruptions'.
